creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #6)

Thank you for committing those changes!

Actually, I wanted to remove some parts of pkg-descr. This is why I updated the patch: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=191137&action=edit
The somewhat updated change set was mentioned here: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=226297#c4

It is not a big problem, however. I may resubmit those changes next time. :)
